trivia_bullets.text: Ondu is one of Zendikar's seven continents, located in the plane's southwestern quadrant — a vast plateau of jagged cliffs, windswept mesas, and cavern-cathedral chambers beneath sheer cliffs. After the Eldrazi titans' release, Ondu's forests and canyons 'teemed with their broods,' but the land itself reportedly resisted: crystalline shards erupted to impale Eldrazi, canyons opened beneath them, and mesas developed limbs to crush them [MTG Wiki: Ondu, via mtg.wiki]. Ondu supports diverse communities including kor, goblins, and elves.

Ondu Champion is typed Minotaur Warrior Ally — the Ally subtype was retooled for Battle for Zendikar from its original Zendikar-block 'adventuring party' framing into a united resistance army against the Eldrazi [WebSearch: BFZ Allies Rally mechanic Zendikari resistance]. The Rally keyword (BFZ's Ally-exclusive mechanic) triggers whenever any Ally enters, granting all controlled creatures trample until end of turn — representing the momentum of a rallying force [Scryfall: oracle_text; MTG Wiki: Rally, via mtg.wiki].
sources: WebSearch: Battle for Zendikar Allies mechanic Rally keyword 2015

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "'Put a minotaur at the head of an army and suddenly all the soldiers act like they have horns.' —Gideon Jura" [Scryfall]. The speaker is Gideon Jura, the planeswalker who spent BFZ rallying Zendikar's survivors into organized resistance — his observation here is pragmatic: minotaur presence transforms troop psychology, not just tactics.

Artist: Volkan Baga [Scryfall]. Baga also illustrated Reckless Cohort (152) in the same set — two BFZ resistance-themed cards sharing an artist, suggestive of a deliberate visual-cohesion pairing within the red Ally cluster. Ondu Champion is Pauper-legal [Scryfall: legalities], EDHREC rank 15154 [Scryfall: edhrec_rank] — the strongest EDHREC showing of the four BFZ cards in this wave, reflecting Ally-tribal's dedicated casual audience.
